text.title: Release Planning Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying release planning end-to-end.

step.name: publish-cadence
step.action: Fix cadence; publish dates quarter ahead.
step.decision-gate: If cadence drifted in prior quarter, lock it harder this quarter.

step.name: assemble-readiness-matrix
step.action: Pull status from owners at T-7d; assemble matrix.
step.decision-gate: If any red at T-7d, escalate; do not wait until T-1.

step.name: manage-deprecations
step.action: Ensure >=90d notice; send customer comms; provide migration tooling.

step.name: assign-post-release-monitor
step.decision-gate: If no on-call PM/eng available, defer release.
